stem: An ecologist launched a program to reduce the population of a certain invasive plant in a wetland. The given function estimates this plant species' population x years after 2010, where x ≤ 10. Which of the following is the best interpretation of 5,200 in this context?

answerOptions.content: The estimated initial plant population for this species in 2010
The estimated plant population for this species 10 years after 2010
The estimated percent decrease in the plant population each year after 2010
The estimated percent decrease in the plant population every 10 years after 2010

rationale: Choice A is correct. The initial value g(0) = 5,200(0.6)0 = 5,200, representing the population in 2010. Choice B: g(10) ≈ 5,200 × 0.006 ≈ 31. Choice C: the yearly decrease is 100(1 − 0.6)% = 40%. Choice D: a 10-year compound decrease.
